title: First Aid, CPR & AED Training
shortDescription: Comprehensive life-saving skills for workplace emergencies.
fullDescription: Equip your employees with the critical skills needed to respond to cardiac arrest, choking, and other medical emergencies until professional help arrives.

title: POSH Awareness
shortDescription: Prevention of Sexual Harassment training for a safe workplace.
fullDescription: Foster a respectful and compliant work environment with our POSH training, covering legal frameworks, redressal mechanisms, and behavioral standards.

title: Mental Health & Stress Management
shortDescription: Techniques for workplace wellness and resilience.
fullDescription: Support employee well-being with programs focused on stress reduction, burnout prevention, and maintaining a healthy work-life balance.

title: Ergonomics & Postures
shortDescription: Workplace design for comfort and injury prevention.
fullDescription: Optimize workstations and physical habits to prevent musculoskeletal disorders and improve overall productivity through sound ergonomic principles.

title: Fire Extinguisher Training
shortDescription: Hands-on P.A.S.S. technique and practical firefighting.
fullDescription: Practical training sessions where employees learn to identify fire types and use the appropriate extinguishers effectively in real-world scenarios.

title: Evacuation Drills & Planning
shortDescription: Ensuring rapid and safe exit during emergencies.
fullDescription: Systematic planning and execution of mock evacuation drills to ensure every employee knows their route and responsibilities during a crisis.

title: Fire Warden Training
shortDescription: Leadership roles in fire prevention and response.
fullDescription: Advanced training for designated fire wardens, covering risk assessment, crowd control, and coordination with emergency services.

title: Defensive Driving (LMV)
shortDescription: Anticipating hazards and reducing road risks for light vehicles.
fullDescription: Advanced techniques for light motor vehicle drivers to enhance situational awareness, technical handling, and proactive hazard avoidance.

title: Heavy Motor Vehicle Safety
shortDescription: Specialized training for fleet and heavy vehicle operators.
fullDescription: Targeted safety programs for HMV drivers, focusing on load stability, blind-spot management, and long-haul fatigue awareness.

title: Road Safety Awareness
shortDescription: General workshops for pedestrians and vehicle operators.
fullDescription: Interactive workshops designed to build a culture of road safety across the organization, reducing commute-related incidents.

title: Work At Height
shortDescription: Fall protection and secure elevated workspace protocols.
fullDescription: Comprehensive training on harness usage, scaffolding safety, and fall arrest systems for high-risk elevated work environments.

title: LOTO Training
fullDescription: Crucial safety protocols for isolating energy sources during maintenance to prevent accidental machine startups and injuries.

title: Confined Space Entry
shortDescription: Atmospheric monitoring and secure entry procedures.
fullDescription: Training on oxygen monitoring, ventilation, and emergency rescue protocols for workers entering tanks, silos, or other restricted areas.

title: Scaffolding Safety
shortDescription: Guidelines for constructing and navigating scaffolds.
fullDescription: Expert training on the safe erection, inspection, and dismantling of scaffolding structures in construction and industrial sites.

title: Disaster Preparedness
shortDescription: Readiness for natural and man-made catastrophes.
fullDescription: Developing robust organizational response plans for floods, earthquakes, and other large-scale emergencies to minimize impact and ensure continuity.

title: Search & Rescue Operations
shortDescription: Tactical response and securing individuals in crises.
fullDescription: Practical skills for search teams to locate and safely extract individuals from hazardous environments during a disaster.
